code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn abs_of(_ v: Int) -> Int
  if v < 0
    -v
  else
    v
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_min = false
mut min_val = 0
mut min_abs_val = 0

while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      let a = abs_of(v)
      if not have_min or a < min_abs_val
        have_min = true
        min_val = v
        min_abs_val = a
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{min_val}")
